case_title: JOHN LUK VS. JOHN SAMUEL et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LUK, JOHN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAMUEL, JOHN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 640 CLAY STREET, #222, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94111, **INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES**
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUK, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT SAMUEL, JOHN DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUK, JOHN SERVED AUG-29-2011, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUK, JOHN
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ; PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUK, JOHN SERVED AUG-29-2011, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUK, JOHN SERVED AUG-29-2011, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT SAMUEL, JOHN

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ALSO SERVED PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUK, JOHN SERVED AUG-29-2011, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT SAMUEL, JOHN
